mapper.sql: id, title, training_type, difficulty, passage_text, question_type, questions, answers, key_vocabulary, tips, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT ri.*, sr.status AS study_status FROM ielts_reading_items ri LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'READING' AND sr.content_id = ri.id
ORDER BY ri.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_reading_items ri LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'READING' AND sr.content_id = ri.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_reading_items (id, title, training_type, difficulty, passage_text, question_type, questions, answers, key_vocabulary, tips, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{title}, #{trainingType}, #{difficulty}, #{passageText}, #{questionType}, #{questions}, #{answers}, #{keyVocabulary}, #{tips}, #{topicTags}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ielts_reading_items SET title = #{title}, training_type = #{trainingType}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, passage_text = #{passageText}, question_type = #{questionType}, questions = #{questions}, answers = #{answers}, key_vocabulary = #{keyVocabulary}, tips = #{tips}, topic_tags = #{topicTags}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ielts_reading_items (id, title, training_type, difficulty, passage_text, question_type, questions, answers, key_vocabulary, tips, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{r.id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{r.title}, #{r.trainingType}, #{r.difficulty}, #{r.passageText}, #{r.questionType}, #{r.questions}, #{r.answers}, #{r.keyVocabulary}, #{r.tips}, #{r.topicTags}, #{r.createdAt}, #{r.updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT ri.* FROM ielts_reading_items ri WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ielts_study_records sr WHERE sr.content_type = 'READING' AND sr.content_id = ri.id ) ORDER BY ri.difficulty, ri.id LIMIT #{limit}
